surface: The hooks + `Provider` surface of react-redux 9.3.0 (`useSelector`, `useDispatch`, `useStore`, and the custom-context factory variants) on octane's `useSyncExternalStore`; works with any Redux 5 / Redux Toolkit store. Export parity is pinned by test.
divergences: `connect()` (the legacy HOC surface) intentionally throws — the hooks API is the supported surface.
ssr: No SSR-specific surface; no dedicated SSR tests.
